inputs.label: Advertised Jackpot
inputs.businessContext: The total annuity jackpot amount advertised.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total annuity jackpot amount advertised.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reklamı yapılan toplam yıllık gelir ikramiye tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total du jackpot en rente annoncé.
businessContext_i18n.es: El monto total del premio mayor de anualidad anunciado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي قيمة الجائزة الكبرى السنوية المعلن عنها.

inputs.label: Cash Option Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of jackpot paid as lump sum (typically 60%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of jackpot paid as lump sum (typically 60%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkramiyenin toplu ödeme olarak ödenen yüzdesi (tipik olarak %60).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Jackpots, der als Pauschalbetrag ausgezahlt wird (typischerweise 60%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du jackpot versé en lump sum (généralement 60 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del premio mayor pagado como suma global (típicamente 60%).

inputs.label: Federal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Federal tax withholding rate for lottery winnings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Federal tax withholding rate for lottery winnings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Piyango kazançları için federal vergi stopaj oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de retenue d'impôt fédéral pour les gains de loterie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de retención federal para ganancias de lotería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة اقتطاع الضريبة الفيدرالية لأرباح اليانصيب.

inputs.label: State Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: State tax withholding rate, varies by state.

businessContext_i18n.en: State tax withholding rate, varies by state.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eyalete göre değişen eyalet vergi stopaj oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de retenue d'impôt d'État, variable selon l'État.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de retención estatal, varía según el estado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة اقتطاع ضريبة الولاية، تختلف حسب الولاية.

inputs.label: Annuity Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of years over which annuity is paid out.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years over which annuity is paid out.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, über die die Rente ausgezahlt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années sur lesquelles la rente est versée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años durante los cuales se paga la anualidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد السنوات التي يتم خلالها دفع القسط السنوي.

inputs.label: Annuity Growth Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual increase in annuity payments (Mega Millions uses 5%).

label_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance de la rente
label_i18n.es: Tasa de crecimiento de la anualidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual increase in annuity payments (Mega Millions uses 5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık gelir ödemelerindeki yıllık artış (Mega Millions %5 kullanır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Steigerung der Rentenzahlungen (Mega Millions verwendet 5%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Augmentation annuelle des paiements de rente (Mega Millions utilise 5 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Incremento anual en los pagos de la anualidad (Mega Millions usa 5%).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزيادة السنوية في دفعات القسط السنوي (ميغا مليون تستخدم 5%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
